scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @lynx-lite/pricing-engine && npm run build -w @lynx-lite/data-collector
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @lynx-lite/api && npm run build -w @lynx-lite/worker
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run prisma:generate && npm run build:apps
scripts.test: npm run test -w @lynx-lite/pricing-engine && npm run test -w @lynx-lite/data-collector && npm run test -w @lynx-lite/api && npm run test -w @lynx-lite/worker
